evaluations.query: Bump the shared logging library to v3 across all our service repos
expected_behavior: Spawns one coordinator plus N parallel subagents, one per target repo
Each subagent works in an isolated worktree, opens a PR, and waits for CI
Reports results to a shared JSON ledger and stops on a novel failure

evaluations.query: Roll out the same GitHub Actions workflow change to 5 repos
expected_behavior: Confirms the same-shape transformation targets 3 or more repos
Treats the rollout as a swarm migration rather than sequential manual edits

evaluations.query: Refactor the auth module in this one repo
expected_behavior: Recognizes single-repo work is out of scope for the swarm
Routes to /ork:implement instead of spawning per-repo subagents

evaluations.query: Explore a few possible approaches for migrating our monorepo layout
expected_behavior: Recognizes this is open-ended exploration, not a fixed transformation
Routes to /ork:brainstorm rather than launching a migration swarm
